@graph.name: TOPSOLAR® PV H1Z2Z2-K
@graph.description: TÜV solar PV cable. ACCORDING TO: EN 50618 / IEC 62930 / UTE C 32-502. The TOPSOLAR® PV H1Z2Z2-K cable, which is TÜV certified according to EN 50618 and AENOR certified according to IEC 62930, is suitable for both fixed and mobile solar installations (solar farms, rooftop solar installations and floating plants). It is a highly flexible cable compatible with all major connectors and specially designed for the connection of photovoltaic panels.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Solar EPC Developers, Electrical Distributors, Renewable Energy Engineers

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - TOPSOLAR® PV H1Z2Z2-K
subjectOf.description: Complete technical specifications, engineering data and certifications for the cable.

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Electrolytic annealed tinned copper, class 5 (flexible) according to IEC 60228 and EN 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free cross-linked rubber according to table B1 in Annex B of EN 50618 and IEC 62930

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free cross-linked flexible rubber according to table B1 in Annex B of EN 50618 and IEC 62930

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Service Temperature
additionalProperty.value: -40 (fixed and protected installations)

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1-2 / IEC 60332-1-2

additionalProperty.name: Fire Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Fire non-propagation according to EN 50399

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: Cca-s1b, d2, a1 according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Low Smoke Halogen Free according to EN 60754-1 / IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.name: Low Corrosive Gases Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to EN 60754-2 / IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Low Smoke Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke emission according to EN 61034 / IEC 61034

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 4x cable diameter (cable diameter ≤ 8 mm), 5x cable diameter (8 < cable diameter ≤ 12 mm), 6x cable diameter (cable diameter > 12 mm)

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG2 Medium severity

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Excellent

additionalProperty.name: UV Resistance
additionalProperty.value: UV Resistant according to EN 50618 and IEC 62930

additionalProperty.name: Water Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AD7+ Immersion, AD8 Submersion

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open Air, Buried, In conduit

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: TÜV Rheinland, RETIE, AENOR, RoHS, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Solar PV installations, Solar farms, Rooftop solar, Floating solar plants

additionalProperty.value: Largest European Stock Holding
